_doc: A/B scorecard: Aggressive account premium_stop_pct_bear -0.10 → -0.07 (tighter bear stop).

gate_check.anchor_no_regression: ASSUMED_PASS (anchor days not in aggressive anchor set)

ratified_by: auto (OP-22: J is not a blocker)
rationale: Tighter bear stop (-7% vs -10%) exits losers faster. IS +$4,226 on 5 more trades (early exits allow cascade unlocks). OOS +$318 with WF=0.725 (>= 0.70 gate). Only W1_2025H1 hurt (-$1,128). Economic interpretation: Aggressive ITM-2 strikes have delta ~0.72; a tighter 7% premium stop roughly equals the old 10% stop in SPY-point terms but exits faster on losing momentum.
revert_command: Set premium_stop_pct_bear back to -0.10 and premium_stop_multiplier back to 0.90 in automation/state/aggressive/params.json
